WITH
cust_czk AS (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM customers
    WHERE Currency = 'Czech koruna'
),
cons_2013 AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM yearmonth y
    JOIN cust_czk c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE substr(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
    GROUP BY y.CustomerID
),
min_total AS (
    SELECT MIN(total_consumption) AS min_cons
    FROM cons_2013
),
min_cust AS (
    SELECT y.CustomerID, y.total_consumption, cu.Segment
    FROM cons_2013 y
    JOIN customers cu ON y.CustomerID = cu.CustomerID
    JOIN min_total m ON y.total_consumption = m.min_cons
)
SELECT
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN total_consumption END) -
    AVG(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN total_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM min_cust;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           strftime('%Y', t.Date) AS yr,
           SUM(t.Amount * t.Price) AS total_eur
    FROM transactions_1k t
    JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND strftime('%Y', t.Date) IN ('2012','2013')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, strftime('%Y', t.Date)
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total_eur END) AS eur_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total_eur END) AS eur_2013
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
growth AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           CASE WHEN eur_2012 = 0 THEN NULL
                ELSE (eur_2013 - eur_2012) * 100.0 / eur_2012
           END AS pct_growth
    FROM pivot
    WHERE Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT Segment FROM growth WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MAX(pct_growth) FROM growth)) AS max_growth_segment,
    (SELECT Segment FROM growth WHERE pct_growth = (SELECT MIN(pct_growth) FROM growth)) AS min_growth_segment
FROM growth
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

WITH
user_id AS (SELECT Id FROM users WHERE DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'),
posts_no_comments AS (
   SELECT p.Id, p.Tags
   FROM posts p
   JOIN user_id u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
   WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM comments c WHERE c.PostId = p.Id)
),
tags_prepared AS (
   SELECT Id,
          TRIM(replace(replace(Tags, '<', ''), '>', '|'), '|') AS tags_str
   FROM posts_no_comments
   WHERE Tags IS NOT NULL AND Tags <> ''
),
recursive split(post_id, tag, rest) AS (
   SELECT Id,
          CASE
            WHEN instr(tags_str, '|') = 0 THEN tags_str
            ELSE substr(tags_str, 1, instr(tags_str, '|')-1)
          END,
          CASE
            WHEN instr(tags_str, '|') = 0 THEN ''
            ELSE substr(tags_str, instr(tags_str, '|')+1)
          END
   FROM tags_prepared
   UNION ALL
   SELECT post_id,
          CASE
            WHEN instr(rest, '|') = 0 THEN rest
            ELSE substr(rest, 1, instr(rest, '|')-1)
          END,
          CASE
            WHEN instr(rest, '|') = 0 THEN ''
            ELSE substr(rest, instr(rest, '|')+1)
          END
   FROM split
   WHERE rest <> ''
)
SELECT DISTINCT tag
FROM split
WHERE tag <> ''
ORDER BY tag;	----- bird -----	codebase_community
